title: Totem of Cute Player Model
description:
将图腾变成你自己的皮肤！
It can change the the Totem to your own skin！
body:
## 概述 Summary
如果你觉得原版的不死图腾太单调和抽象，那么这个材质包是个不错的选择。
它将不死图腾做成了玩家的模型。不过与玩家相比，不死图腾的模型更加可爱 _（头身比为1:3，玩家为1：5）_。\
If you find vanilla totem too monotonous and abstract, then this Resource Pack is a good choice.
This Resource Pack makes the totem to be a model player. However, compared to the player, the totem model is more cute _(1:3 for the head-to-body ratio and 1:5 for the player)_.

  ![用 /replace 戴在头上的图腾](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BT2na8aq/images/fc0a249c7fa795a81a68dbfd5d968945b6b1a3d0.png)
  更多图片请查看Gallery


## 定制 Customize
图片中展示的是**slim版本**，用于细手臂模型，如果你想更改成粗壮的皮肤 可以选择**classic版本**。定制的方法在资源包中的README.txt里。也可以点击下方直接查看。\
The picture shows the **slim version**, which is used for the thin arm model, and if you want to change to a coarse arm, you can choose the **classic version**. The method of customization is in the 
 README.txt in the pack. You can also click below to view it directly.

<details>
<summary>click here</summary>

修改方法
1. 准备好你的皮肤uv文件，命名为```totem_of_undying.png```
2. 打开包，按路径找到文件```assets\minecraft\textures\item\totem_of_undying.png```
3. 替换为已选择的皮肤文件


Customize method
1. Prepare your skin UV png named ```totem_of_undying.png```
2. Open the resourcespack and follow the path to find the file ```assets\minecraft\textures\item\totem_of_undying.png```
3. Replace with the selected skin png

</details>

## 安装 install
拉倒右边即可 Pull down the right side\
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BT2na8aq/images/ef73bc1da824b69c4840dc00b5d90c77791ab27c.png)\
仍需要注意的是，本资源包和[不死图腾插槽（Charm of Undying）](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm-of-undying)一同使用时，可能会导致不死图腾的位置比较尴尬。
